features: Luxurious 500ml bottle of RADOX Herb Bath Muscle Soak
Relax and soothe tired muscles after a long day
Infused with natural herbs for a rejuvenating experience
Delivers a refreshing aroma to invigorate your senses
Perfect for unwinding and relieving tension in the comfort of your own home
description: Product Description Indulge in a luxurious bath experience with RADOX Herb Bath Muscle Soak. Designed to help you unwind and rejuvenate, this 500ml bottle of bliss is your ticket to relaxation after a long day. Immerse yourself in the soothing embrace of natural herbs, expertly blended to ease tired muscles and melt away tension. Let the refreshing aroma invigorate your senses as you sink into a state of tranquility and well-being. Perfect for a home-spa experience, RADOX Herb Bath Muscle Soak offers the ultimate in pampering and self-care. Treat yourself to the comfort and relief you deserve with every soak. Ingredients The ingredients in RADOX Herb Bath Muscle Soak are carefully selected to provide a soothing and rejuvenating experience. While specific formulations may vary, typical ingredients may include: - Water (Aqua) - Sodium Laureth Sulfate - Cocamidopropyl Betaine - Sodium Chloride - Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil - Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Leaf Oil - Thymus Vulgaris (Thyme) Oil - Salvia Officinalis (Sage) Oil - Sodium Lactate - Polyquaternium-7 - Propylene Glycol - Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose - Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer - Sodium Benzoate - Tetrasodium EDTA - Citric Acid - Linalool - Limonene - CI 17200 - CI 42090 Always check the product label for the most accurate and up-to-date list of ingredients, as formulations may change over time. Directions Add 1 to 2 capsules into the bath water and relax to enjoy the benefits of refreshing aroma and natural herbs. Safety Warning Avoid contact with eyes. May cause skin irritation in some users. Do not use in a bathtub without first ensuring it is clean and free of soap residue. The bathtub may become slippery when using this product. See more
